# 341meeting.org

> Plain-English guide to the 341 meeting of creditors under 11 U.S.C. Section 341.

341meeting.org is a free, open-source educational resource about the 341 meeting of creditors in bankruptcy. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://341meeting.org/: Overview of the 341 meeting -- your only required bankruptcy appearance
- https://341meeting.org/what-to-expect.html: Step-by-step walkthrough of the 341 meeting from arrival to adjournment
- https://341meeting.org/questions-they-ask.html: Actual trustee questions organized by Chapter 7 and Chapter 13
- https://341meeting.org/documents-to-bring.html: Checklist of required and recommended documents
- https://341meeting.org/phone-vs-in-person.html: Post-COVID guide to remote and in-person meetings
- https://341meeting.org/zoom-vs-phone.html: Zoom vs phone 341 meetings -- technology tips and what to expect
- https://341meeting.org/what-happens-if-you-miss.html: Consequences of missing the 341 meeting and how to reschedule
- https://341meeting.org/what-if-i-miss.html: What if I miss my 341 meeting -- quick guide
- https://341meeting.org/chapter-7-vs-chapter-13.html: How the 341 meeting differs between Chapter 7 and Chapter 13
- https://341meeting.org/index-es.html: Guia en espanol -- Junta 341 de Acreedores

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
